markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review progress on SDR enablement workflow and discuss next steps for Okta-GrowthX collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX demonstrated a new AI-powered SDR call brief workflow, generating detailed account research and call prep materials](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Rachael provided feedback on improving the workflow output and integrating it into SDR processes](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Plans discussed to run the workflow for 44 target accounts and potentially replace Clay with this new system](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Need identified to develop account tiering/prioritization capabilities in the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=2276.0)

## Topics

### SDR Call Brief Workflow Demo

  - [GrowthX showed an AI workflow that generates comprehensive account research and call prep materials for SDRs](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Inputs: Company name and one contact; outputs: detailed company profile, stakeholders, pain points, value props, objection handling](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [30-minute research process pulls from artifacts, online sources, LinkedIn to create SDR-ready brief](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Rachael provided feedback: add LinkedIn profile links, focus more on email vs. calls, include child brand research](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)

### Workflow Integration and Scaling

  - [Discussed exporting workflow outputs to Google Docs/Drive for SDR access](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
  - [Potential to replace Clay with this new system if it can match/exceed current capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [Plans to run workflow for 44 target accounts after some refinements](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Exploring options to give Rachael/Erick direct access to the GrowthX platform](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)

### Account Prioritization Framework

  - [Rachael proposed developing tiering system (Tier 1-3) based on criteria like:](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=2260.0)
      - [Presence of loyalty program](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=2168.0)
      - [Recent data breaches](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
      - [Fragmented identity systems](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
  - [GrowthX agreed this could be built into the workflow's qualification process](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=2276.0)
  - [Goal: Help SDRs focus efforts on highest-potential accounts](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=2531.0)

### SDR Collaboration

  - [Rachael to connect GrowthX with two high-performing SDRs (Nick and Christian) for feedback/testing](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=2674.0)
  - [Discussion of SDR performance-based selection for experiments and enablement](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=2394.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Erick introduced as new member of Rachael's team, with prior SDR experience](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [George transitioning to Chief of Staff role but will remain involved in Okta account](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=2621.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to export initial workflow outputs to Google Drive for Rachael's review](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
  - [Implement Rachael's feedback on workflow output format/content](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore giving Rachael/Erick limited access to their platform](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
  - [Rachael to connect GrowthX with SDRs Nick and Christian](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=2674.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with Jenna (timing TBD when she returns)](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Develop plan for running workflow across 44 target accounts](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate adding account tiering capabilities to workflow](https://fathom.video/share/wLxbpA1fuskPcJpWzop8kwjt4cz23LYd?tab=summary&timestamp=2276.0)
